request: Pick the most impactful Bead to work on now.

selected_bead.title: Resolve context dependency loop
selected_bead.reason: Graph is in a cycle (bd-301->bd-303->bd-302->bd-301). This Bead is ready, has modest metrics, but breaks the cycle and unblocks all decoys with inflated priority values.

commands_used.why: Detected cycle in health.cycles, identified ready cycle-breaking candidate.

rejected_candidates.reason: Self-blocked and part of cycle; high PageRank but not actionable.
